mapper.insert: insert into student_internship_status ( student_id, status, company_id, position_id, has_complaint, is_delayed, is_interrupted, create_time, update_time, student_name, gender, school, grade, education, college, major_name, class_name, contact_phone, email, company_name, position_name, company_address, company_phone, graduate_school, graduate_major, other_reason, remark ) values ( #{studentId}, #{status}, #{companyId}, #{positionId}, #{hasComplaint}, #{isDelayed}, #{isInterrupted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{studentName}, #{gender}, #{school}, #{grade}, #{education}, #{college}, #{majorName}, #{className}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{companyName}, #{positionName}, #{companyAddress}, #{companyPhone}, #{graduateSchool}, #{graduateMajor}, #{otherReason}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select sis.id as sis_id, sis.student_id as sis_student_id, sis.status as sis_status, sis.company_id as sis_company_id, sis.position_id as sis_position_id, sis.has_complaint as sis_has_complaint, sis.is_delayed as sis_is_delayed, sis.is_interrupted as sis_is_interrupted, sis.create_time as sis_create_time, sis.update_time as sis_update_time, sis.recall_status as sis_recall_status, sis.recall_reason as sis_recall_reason, sis.recall_apply_time as sis_recall_apply_time, sis.recall_audit_time as sis_recall_audit_time, sis.recall_reviewer_id as sis_recall_reviewer_id, sis.recall_audit_remark as sis_recall_audit_remark, sis.company_confirm_status as sis_company_confirm_status, sis.internship_start_time as sis_internship_start_time, sis.internship_end_time as sis_internship_end_time, sis.internship_duration as sis_internship_duration, sis.feedback as sis_feedback, sis.remark as sis_remark, sis.student_name as sis_student_name, sis.gender as sis_gender, sis.grade as sis_grade, sis.major_name as sis_major_name, sis.class_name as sis_class_name, sis.contact_phone as sis_contact_phone, sis.email as sis_email, sis.company_name as sis_company_name, sis.position_name as sis_position_name, sis.company_address as sis_company_address, sis.company_phone as sis_company_phone, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, cls.id as cls_id, cls.name as cls_name, m.id as m_id, m.name as m_name, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join class cls on su.class_id = cls.id left join major m on su.major_id = m.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.id = #{id}

select sis.id as sis_id, sis.student_id as sis_student_id, sis.status as sis_status, sis.company_id as sis_company_id, sis.position_id as sis_position_id, sis.has_complaint as sis_has_complaint, sis.is_delayed as sis_is_delayed, sis.is_interrupted as sis_is_interrupted, sis.create_time as sis_create_time, sis.update_time as sis_update_time, sis.recall_status as sis_recall_status, sis.recall_reason as sis_recall_reason, sis.recall_apply_time as sis_recall_apply_time, sis.recall_audit_time as sis_recall_audit_time, sis.recall_reviewer_id as sis_recall_reviewer_id, sis.recall_audit_remark as sis_recall_audit_remark, sis.company_confirm_status as sis_company_confirm_status, sis.internship_start_time as sis_internship_start_time, sis.internship_end_time as sis_internship_end_time, sis.internship_duration as sis_internship_duration, sis.feedback as sis_feedback, sis.remark as sis_remark, sis.student_name as sis_student_name, sis.gender as sis_gender, sis.grade as sis_grade, sis.major_name as sis_major_name, sis.class_name as sis_class_name, sis.contact_phone as sis_contact_phone, sis.email as sis_email, sis.company_name as sis_company_name, sis.position_name as sis_position_name, sis.company_address as sis_company_address, sis.company_phone as sis_company_phone, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, cls.id as cls_id, cls.name as cls_name, m.id as m_id, m.name as m_name, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join class cls on su.class_id = cls.id left join major m on su.major_id = m.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.student_id = #{studentId} order by sis.create_time desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update student_internship_status
student_id = #{studentId},
status = #{status},
company_id = #{companyId},
position_id = #{positionId},
has_complaint = #{hasComplaint},
is_delayed = #{isDelayed},
is_interrupted = #{isInterrupted},
recall_status = #{recallStatus},
recall_reason = #{recallReason},
recall_apply_time = #{recallApplyTime},
recall_audit_time = #{recallAuditTime},
recall_reviewer_id = #{recallReviewerId},
recall_audit_remark = #{recallAuditRemark},
company_confirm_status = #{companyConfirmStatus},
internship_start_time = #{internshipStartTime},
internship_end_time = #{internshipEndTime},
internship_duration = #{internshipDuration},
feedback = #{feedback},
remark = #{remark},
student_name = #{studentName},
gender = #{gender},
school = #{school},
grade = #{grade},
education = #{education},
college = #{college},
major_name = #{majorName},
class_name = #{className},
contact_phone = #{contactPhone},
email = #{email},
company_name = #{companyName},
position_name = #{positionName},
company_address = #{companyAddress},
company_phone = #{companyPhone},
graduate_school = #{graduateSchool},
graduate_major = #{graduateMajor},
other_reason = #{otherReason},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select sis.id as sis_id, sis.student_id as sis_student_id, sis.status as sis_status, sis.company_id as sis_company_id, sis.position_id as sis_position_id, sis.has_complaint as sis_has_complaint, sis.is_delayed as sis_is_delayed, sis.is_interrupted as sis_is_interrupted, sis.create_time as sis_create_time, sis.update_time as sis_update_time, sis.recall_status as sis_recall_status, sis.recall_reason as sis_recall_reason, sis.recall_apply_time as sis_recall_apply_time, sis.recall_audit_time as sis_recall_audit_time, sis.recall_reviewer_id as sis_recall_reviewer_id, sis.recall_audit_remark as sis_recall_audit_remark, sis.company_confirm_status as sis_company_confirm_status, sis.internship_start_time as sis_internship_start_time, sis.internship_end_time as sis_internship_end_time, sis.internship_duration as sis_internship_duration, sis.feedback as sis_feedback, sis.remark as sis_remark, sis.student_name as sis_student_name, sis.gender as sis_gender, sis.grade as sis_grade, sis.major_name as sis_major_name, sis.class_name as sis_class_name, sis.contact_phone as sis_contact_phone, sis.email as sis_email, sis.company_name as sis_company_name, sis.position_name as sis_position_name, sis.company_address as sis_company_address, sis.company_phone as sis_company_phone, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, cls.id as cls_id, cls.name as cls_name, m.id as m_id, m.name as m_name, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join class cls on su.class_id = cls.id left join major m on su.major_id = m.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id order by sis.create_time desc

select sis.id as sis_id, sis.student_id as sis_student_id, sis.status as sis_status, sis.company_id as sis_company_id, sis.position_id as sis_position_id, sis.has_complaint as sis_has_complaint, sis.is_delayed as sis_is_delayed, sis.is_interrupted as sis_is_interrupted, sis.create_time as sis_create_time, sis.update_time as sis_update_time, sis.recall_status as sis_recall_status, sis.recall_reason as sis_recall_reason, sis.recall_apply_time as sis_recall_apply_time, sis.recall_audit_time as sis_recall_audit_time, sis.recall_reviewer_id as sis_recall_reviewer_id, sis.recall_audit_remark as sis_recall_audit_remark, sis.company_confirm_status as sis_company_confirm_status, sis.internship_start_time as sis_internship_start_time, sis.internship_end_time as sis_internship_end_time, sis.internship_duration as sis_internship_duration, sis.feedback as sis_feedback, sis.remark as sis_remark, sis.student_name as sis_student_name, sis.gender as sis_gender, sis.grade as sis_grade, sis.major_name as sis_major_name, sis.class_name as sis_class_name, sis.contact_phone as sis_contact_phone, sis.email as sis_email, sis.company_name as sis_company_name, sis.position_name as sis_position_name, sis.company_address as sis_company_address, sis.company_phone as sis_company_phone, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, cls.id as cls_id, cls.name as cls_name, m.id as m_id, m.name as m_name, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join class cls on su.class_id = cls.id left join major m on su.major_id = m.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id where sis.id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student_internship_status WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status

select sis.id as sis_id, sis.student_id as sis_student_id, sis.status as sis_status, sis.company_id as sis_company_id, sis.position_id as sis_position_id, sis.has_complaint as sis_has_complaint, sis.is_delayed as sis_is_delayed, sis.is_interrupted as sis_is_interrupted, sis.create_time as sis_create_time, sis.update_time as sis_update_time, sis.recall_status as sis_recall_status, sis.recall_reason as sis_recall_reason, sis.recall_apply_time as sis_recall_apply_time, sis.recall_audit_time as sis_recall_audit_time, sis.recall_reviewer_id as sis_recall_reviewer_id, sis.recall_audit_remark as sis_recall_audit_remark, sis.company_confirm_status as sis_company_confirm_status, sis.internship_start_time as sis_internship_start_time, sis.internship_end_time as sis_internship_end_time, sis.internship_duration as sis_internship_duration, sis.feedback as sis_feedback, sis.remark as sis_remark, sis.student_name as sis_student_name, sis.gender as sis_gender, sis.grade as sis_grade, sis.major_name as sis_major_name, sis.class_name as sis_class_name, sis.contact_phone as sis_contact_phone, sis.email as sis_email, sis.company_name as sis_company_name, sis.position_name as sis_position_name, sis.company_address as sis_company_address, sis.company_phone as sis_company_phone, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, cls.id as cls_id, cls.name as cls_name, m.id as m_id, m.name as m_name, c.id as c_id, c.company_name as c_company_name, c.contact_person as c_contact_person, c.contact_phone as c_contact_phone, c.contact_email as c_contact_email, c.address as c_address, p.id as p_id, p.position_name as p_position_name, p.requirements as p_requirements, p.planned_recruit as p_planned_recruit, p.recruited_count as p_recruited_count, p.remaining_quota as p_remaining_quota from student_internship_status sis left join student_users su on sis.student_id = su.id left join class cls on su.class_id = cls.id left join major m on su.major_id = m.id left join company_users c on sis.company_id = c.id left join position p on sis.position_id = p.id order by sis.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT * FROM student_internship_status ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasOfferCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notFoundCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT su.id), 1) AS progressRate FROM major m LEFT JOIN student_users su ON m.id = su.major_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY progressRate DESC

SELECT c.name AS className, m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasOfferCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notFoundCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT su.id), 1) AS progressRate FROM class c LEFT JOIN major m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN student_users su ON c.id = su.class_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, m.name ORDER BY m.name, c.name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_internship_status WHERE recall_status = #{recallStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE student_internship_status SET recall_status = 1, recall_reason = #{recallReason}, recall_apply_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND recall_status = 0

UPDATE student_internship_status
recall_status = #{recallStatus}, recall_audit_time = NOW(), recall_reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
recall_audit_remark = #{recallAuditRemark},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND recall_status = 1

UPDATE student_internship_status SET recall_status = 0, recall_reason = NULL, recall_apply_time = NULL, recall_audit_time = NULL, recall_reviewer_id = NULL, recall_audit_remark = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE recall_status IS NOT NULL AND recall_status > 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)

SELECT su.grade AS gradeName, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY su.grade ORDER BY su.grade

SELECT m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY m.name

SELECT c.name AS className, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON su.class_id = c.id
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 OR sis.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id
AND su.status = 1
AND su.class_id IN
#{classId}
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)

SELECT c.name AS className, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN class c ON su.class_id = c.id
AND su.class_id IN
#{classId}
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name

SELECT su.grade AS gradeName, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sis.status IS NULL OR sis.status != 4 THEN su.id END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id
AND su.class_id IN
#{classId}
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY su.grade ORDER BY su.grade

SELECT m.name AS majorName, COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS noOffer, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delay FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id
AND su.class_id IN
#{classId}
AND (sis.update_time >= #{startDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
AND (sis.update_time <= #{endDate} OR sis.update_time IS NULL)
GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY m.name
mapper.update: UPDATE student_internship_status SET status = 5, update_time = NOW() WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
